prompt: Create an ancient-style artwork inspired by image 1, showing the figure from image 2 performing a ritual beneath the sun disk.
prompt_refined: Generate an ancient-style artwork, drawing heavily from the intricate relief carving aesthetic and detailed motifs of image 1. The central focus should be a human figure, adopting the raised-arm posture of image 2, performing a ritual. This figure must be positioned directly beneath a prominent sun disk, which itself embodies the detailed, circular design and ancient style of image 1.
objects: Sun disk with detailed, circular design
Human figure positioned directly beneath sun disk
